accurate.why: All details match bill text; correctly identifies designation, findings, references provision, and approval date.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all facts correspond to bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the commemorative naming purpose.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the references provision and explicitly states no existing legal authorities are altered.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers designation, findings, references provision, and scope limitation.

concise.why: No unnecessary padding; appropriate detail level.

correct_entities.why: CBP and Air and Marine Operations correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dates and address match bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
